name: Flicky™
short_description: Join the adventures of Flicky™, a fun-loving, little blue bird who drives cats everywhere crazy! As a heroic bird, find all of the missing Chirps and guide them to the “Exit” where they’ll be safe from those mischievous felines and other ferocious domesticated animals in the house.
detailed_description:
Join the adventures of Flicky™, a fun-loving, little blue bird who drives cats everywhere crazy!
As a heroic bird, find all of the missing Chirps and guide them to the “Exit” where they’ll be safe from those mischievous felines and other ferocious domesticated animals in the house.
about_the_game:
Join the adventures of Flicky™, a fun-loving, little blue bird who drives cats everywhere crazy!
As a heroic bird, find all of the missing Chirps and guide them to the “Exit” where they’ll be safe from those mischievous felines and other ferocious domesticated animals in the house.
